case_title: FOX DOUGLAS PAUL VS COHEN WONG KNUUT AND GREENE CORP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $648.00 FILED BY FOX DOUGLAS PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN WONG KNUUT AND GREENE CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN WONG KNUUT AND GREENE CORP
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOX DOUGLAS PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COHEN WONG KNUUT AND GREENE CORP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
